steps.title: Identify the probability formula
steps.content: For any probability question, use the basic formula: Probability = (Favorable outcomes) / (Total outcomes). We need to find how many ways to roll a 3, and how many total possible outcomes exist.

steps.title: Apply the formula to this die
steps.content:
On a 16-sided fair die:
  • Total possible outcomes: 16 (one for each face, labeled 1 through 16)
  • Favorable outcomes (rolling a 3): 1 (only one face is labeled with a 3)
Therefore, the probability is $\frac{1}{16}$. That matches the correct answer - A is correct.
